type="coord_z"></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">{&#10;    BlockPos pos = BlockPos.containing(x, y, z);&#10;    boolean isCharging = false;&#10;&#10;    // Check for any entity above the block (slightly expanded hitbox)&#10;    AABB detectionBox = new AABB(x, y - 0.5, z, x + 1, y + 1.5, z + 1);&#10;    List<Entity> entities = world.getEntitiesOfClass(Entity.class, detectionBox, e ->&#10;        !e.getType().toString().equals("minecraft:item") && e.isAlive()&#10;    );&#10;&#10;    if (!entities.isEmpty()) {&#10;        isCharging = true;&#10;    }&#10;&#10;    BlockEntity blockEntity = world.getBlockEntity(pos);&#10;    BlockState state = world.getBlockState(pos);&#10;&#10;    if (blockEntity != null) {&#10;        blockEntity.getPersistentData().putBoolean("charging", isCharging);&#10;    }&#10;&#10;    if (world instanceof Level level) {&#10;        level.sendBlockUpdated(pos, state, state, 3);&#10;    }&#10;}</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation else="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">AND</field><value name="A"><block === CONFIG ===&#10;double height = 2.0;&#10;double radius = 0.75;&#10;int turns = 4;&#10;double speed = 0.015;&#10;&#10;// Redstone particle needs a color (R, G, B) and scale&#10;float r = 0.9f;&#10;float g = 0.1f;&#10;float b = 0.1f;&#10;float scale = 1.0f;&#10;&#10;// Construct the dust particle options&#10;ParticleOptions particle = new DustParticleOptions(new Vector3f(r, g, b), scale);&#10;&#10;// === ONLY RUN ON SERVER ===&#10;if (world instanceof ServerLevel level) {&#10;    long gameTime = level.getGameTime();&#10;    double time = (gameTime % (int)(height / speed)) * speed;&#10;&#10;    double centerX = x + 0.5;&#10;    double centerY = y + 1;&#10;    double centerZ = z + 0.5;&#10;&#10;    // base angle for the first helix&#10;    double angle1 = (time / height) * turns * 2 * Math.PI;&#10;    double px1 = centerX + Math.cos(angle1) * radius;&#10;    double py1 = centerY + time;&#10;    double pz1 = centerZ + Math.sin(angle1) * radius;&#10;&#10;    // second helix is 180° offset (Math.PI)&#10;    double angle2 = angle1 + Math.PI;&#10;    double px2 = centerX + Math.cos(angle2) * radius;&#10;    double py2 = centerY + time;&#10;    double pz2 = centerZ + Math.sin(angle2) * radius;&#10;&#10;    // spawn both helices&#10;    level.sendParticles(particle, px1, py1, pz1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0);&#10;    level.sendParticles(particle, px2, py2, pz2, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0);&#10;}&#10;</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">GTE</field><value name="A"><block type="block_nbt_num_get"><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">progress</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">50</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block
